AN NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMED AN EF-0 TORNADO DEVELOPED OVER OR ALONG THE SHORELINE OF EASTERN LAKE FENTON LATE YESTERDAY EVENING/JULY 11TH. THE TORNADO TRACKED EAST-SOUTHEAST FOR 7.5 MILES AND WAS ON THE GROUND FOR 9 MINUTES BEFORE LIFTING 3 MILES EAST-SOUTHEAST OF HOLLY/JUST WEST OF I-75.
